metadata.title: Threads Search · Search your posts and view insights
metadata.description: Search the Threads posts you have written and review your views, likes, replies, and reposts at a glance.
metadata.shortDescription: Search your Threads posts and review insights at a glance.
metadata.keywords: Threads, insights, post analytics, Threads statistics, social media analytics

home.tagline1: Search the Threads posts you have written
home.tagline2: and review detailed insights at a glance.
home.searchCardDescription: Quickly find Threads posts you have written by text and jump to the original.
home.insightsCardDescription: View totals for views, likes, and replies, and explore media, weekday, and time-of-day patterns.

auth.title: Connect your Threads account
auth.subtitle: You need to authorize this service with your Threads account via OAuth in order to use it.

permissionBasic.title: Basic profile (threads_basic)
permissionBasic.description: Used to display your username, name, and profile picture, and to fetch the list of posts you authored.

permissionInsights.title: Insights (threads_manage_insights, optional)
permissionInsights.description: Used to fetch view, like, reply, and repost counts for your own posts. This is required for the Insights Dashboard, so please make sure to enable it on the consent screen.

auth.noPostingNotice: This service does not request permission to publish or delete posts.
auth.metaDisclaimer: This service is not an official Meta product.
auth.dataHandling1: Access tokens are stored only in your browser cookie (HttpOnly) and are never written to a server-side database.
auth.dataHandling2: Post and insight data are cached in memory for up to 5 minutes only — there is no persistent storage.
auth.dataHandling3: Signing out or revoking permission from Threads immediately cuts off our access.
auth.policyLinks: For details, please review the {privacy} and the {terms}.

search.noPostsTitle: You don't have any posts yet
search.noPostsDescription: Posts you publish on Threads will appear here.

insights.noPostsDescription: Once you publish on Threads your statistics will appear here.

footer.copyright: © {year} Threads-insight Team · This service is not an official Meta Platforms, Inc. product.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The Threads-insight Team ("we", "us", or the "Operator") takes the privacy of users of Threads Search (the "Service") seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect personal information in compliance with applicable laws.
privacy.s1Lead: Through Meta's Threads API, we temporarily collect and access the following information:
privacy.s1Item1: Threads user ID, username, and display name
privacy.s1Item3: Text, timestamp, media type, and permalink of the Threads posts you authored
privacy.s1Item4: Per-post insight metrics (views, likes, replies, reposts, quotes)
privacy.s1Item5: OAuth access token (stored in your browser cookie)
privacy.s1Note: We do not require a separate sign-up and we never store credentials such as passwords.
privacy.s2Item1: Providing a search feature over your own posts
privacy.s2Item2: Providing an insights dashboard for your own posts
privacy.s2Item3: Maintaining your sign-in state and verifying you as the account owner
privacy.s3Title: 3. Where We Store Data and for How Long
privacy.s3Item1: **Access tokens and identifiers** are stored in your browser cookie and expire 60 days after issuance. They are deleted immediately when you sign out.
privacy.s3Item2: **Posts and insights data** are not persisted; they are cached in server memory for up to 5 minutes. The cache expires automatically or refreshes when you reload.
privacy.s3Item3: We do not save your data into any persistent database.
privacy.s4Body: We do not share collected personal information with any third party, and we do not delegate processing. However, the Service operates on top of the Threads API provided by Meta Platforms, Inc., so Meta's own policies apply to data exchanged via Meta APIs.
privacy.s5Lead: You can exercise the following rights at any time:
privacy.s5Item1: Immediately delete tokens and identifiers via the Service's sign-out feature
privacy.s5Item2: Revoke the Service's access through Threads app → Settings → Account → Websites
privacy.s5Item3: Request data access or deletion via the contact below
privacy.s6Lead: We use the following cookies to maintain your sign-in state:
privacy.s6Note: You can block cookies via your browser settings, but the Service will not function if you do.
privacy.s7Item1: All communications are encrypted via HTTPS.
privacy.s7Item2: Access tokens are stored in HttpOnly cookies and are not accessible to client-side scripts.
privacy.s7Item3: Insight caches are isolated per user and expire automatically after 5 minutes.
privacy.s8Body: If this policy changes we will update the effective date and post the revised policy on this page. For material changes we will notify users on their next sign-in.
privacy.s9Lead: For privacy inquiries, access, or deletion requests, please contact:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using Threads Search (the "Service") provided by the Threads-insight Team (the "Operator"), as well as the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of the Operator and the user.
terms.s2Body: The Service is a tool that helps users search the Threads posts they have authored on the platform provided by Meta Platforms, Inc., and visualize insight statistics for their own posts. The Service is not an official Meta product and has no partnership or affiliation with Meta.
terms.s3Item1: OAuth authentication with your own Threads account is required to use the Service.
terms.s3Item2: You must comply with the terms of service of Threads and Meta. Use of this Service does not exempt you from compliance with those terms.
terms.s3Item3: The Service is not recommended for users under the age of 14.
terms.s4Item1: You may only use the Service with your own account.
terms.s4Item2: You may not use automation, scripts, or crawlers in a way that abnormally loads the Service or Meta APIs.
terms.s4Item3: You may not redistribute or process data obtained through the Service in a way that violates Meta's terms.
terms.s5Item1: The Service is in beta. The Operator does not guarantee accuracy or availability of data.
terms.s5Item2: Some features may stop working due to changes in the policies or capabilities of the Threads API.
terms.s5Item3: The Operator is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising from use of the Service, except where willful misconduct or gross negligence on the Operator's part is established.
terms.s6Body: The Operator may modify or discontinue any part of the Service without prior notice. When discontinuation is decided, the Operator will make reasonable efforts to give advance notice.
terms.s7Body: If these Terms change we will update the effective date and post the revision on this page. Continued use of the Service after such changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s8Body: Disputes regarding these Terms and the Service are interpreted under the laws of the Republic of Korea, and the courts of competent jurisdiction under the Korean Code of Civil Procedure shall have jurisdiction.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
dataDeletion.subtitle: Threads Search does not permanently store your posts or insights. You can fully remove any data the Service holds using any of the methods below.
dataDeletion.m1Heading: The "Sign out" button on the home screen
dataDeletion.m1Body: Signing out immediately deletes the five cookies holding your access token, identifier, and profile information from your browser. The server-side cache expires automatically within 5 minutes.
dataDeletion.m2Body: You can permanently revoke this Service's access from the Threads side. When you do, any access token we hold becomes invalid immediately and we can no longer access any data.
dataDeletion.m3Body: Use the subject line "Threads Search data deletion request" and include your Threads username so we can verify ownership. We respond within 7 business days and complete the request within 30 days.
dataDeletion.noteTitle: Reference · What data the Service stores
dataDeletion.noteItem2: **Server in-memory cache** · Expires automatically after 5 minutes, no persistent storage
dataDeletion.noteOutro: Because there is no separate database, signing out or revoking permission in Threads effectively removes all information the Service holds. See the {privacyLink} for details.
